top_items.title: How to find the sweet spot between cost and performance
top_items.one_liner: Balancing generative AI costs and performance requires a strategic mix of tools and services, not just cheapest options.

top_items.title: Anthropic Launches Claude Managed Agents (That Make Agentic AI Workflows Real)
top_items.one_liner: Anthropic introduces Claude Managed Agents for building and deploying agentic AI workflows efficiently.
